title: Visualizing the Gradient of a Matrix-Valued Function
description: A diagram showing how a scalar field (f) is transformed by a matrix (A), and how the gradient (∇f) is transformed by the same matrix's transpose (Aᵀ) to produce the gradient of the resulting vector (∇(Af)).
elements: Output Vector Field g(x) = A * f(x)
relationships: f(x) is input to both ∇ and A
A operates on f(x) to produce g(x)
The product Aᵀ * ∇f(x) equals the gradient ∇g(x)
